---
# SETTLED — 2026-06-06. The color plates: prose register specimens.
title: "Specimen Name"
type: specimen
facets:
  register: ""       # e.g. instructional, atmospheric, terse, bureaucratic
  rhythm: ""         # e.g. staccato, flowing, complex
  perspective: ""    # e.g. first-person, second-person, third-person
provenance: ""       # corpus | researched | synthesis
---

## The Specimen
<!-- The actual block of prose being showcased. -->

> Quote the text block here.

## Analysis
<!-- Why this works. The "Blueprint" of the rhythm and register. -->

::: {.callout-note}
### The Field Mark
The specific linguistic feature to look for in this register. [synthesis]
:::

## When to reach for it
<!-- Match the register to the design goal. -->
